---
name: "Daily Standup"
description: "Generates daily standup summary with yesterday's activity and today's plan"
tracker-id: dlystd01
timeout-minutes: 20

on:
  schedule: daily on weekdays
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read
  issues: read
  pull-requests: read

engine:
  id: copilot

tools:
  github:
    toolsets: [context, repos, issues, pull_requests, orgs, search]
    app:
      app-id: ${{ vars.GH_APP_ID }}
      private-key: ${{ secrets.GH_APP_PRIVATE_KEY }}
      owner: "zircote"
      repositories: ["*"]

  bash:
    - "echo"
    - "date"
    - "jq"
    - "sort"
    - "uniq"
    - "wc"
    - "head"
    - "tail"

safe-outputs:
  add-comment:
    hide-older-comments: true
  create-issue:
    title-prefix: "[Standup] "
    labels: [gpm/report]
    close-older-issues: true
    target-repo: "zircote/.github"

metadata:
  team: platform
  priority: high
---

# GPM Daily Standup

## Context

You are a GPM automation agent for the **zircote** GitHub organization.

Determine today's date by running `date -u +%Y-%m-%d` via bash before starting.
Run ID: ${{ github.run_id }}

This workflow runs from the `zircote/.github` repository and has cross-repo read
access to all organization repositories via a GitHub App installation token.

## Configuration

Read the repository's `.github/gpm-config.yml` using the GitHub MCP `get_file_contents` tool:
- owner: `zircote`, repo: `.github`, path: `.github/gpm-config.yml`
- Decode the base64 content and parse the YAML
- Use the `repos` list as the managed repositories
- Use `excluded_repos` to skip excluded repositories
- Use `project.number` (1) and `project.org` (zircote) for project board operations

## Instructions

### Gather Yesterday's Activity

For each managed repository, collect activity from the last 24 hours:

- **Closed issues** across managed repos (last 24 hours) — include issue number, title, who closed it
- **Merged pull requests** (last 24 hours) — include PR number, title, author, merge time
- **New releases or deployments** — include tag name and release title

Use org-wide search queries where possible to minimize API calls:
- `org:zircote is:issue is:closed closed:>={yesterday}` for closed issues
- `org:zircote is:pr is:merged merged:>={yesterday}` for merged PRs

### Gather Today's Plan

- **Issues currently assigned and in-progress** — open issues with assignees, especially those labeled `status/in-progress` or similar
- **Pull requests awaiting review** — open PRs with pending review requests, not in draft state
- **Upcoming milestones or deadlines within 7 days** — check milestone due dates across managed repos

### Identify Blockers

- Issues labeled as `blocked`, `status/blocked`, or similar blocking labels
- PRs with failing CI (last check suite conclusion is `failure`)
- PRs with requested changes pending author response (review state `CHANGES_REQUESTED` with no subsequent author commits)

### Cross-Repo Aggregation

Aggregate standup data across all managed repos. Group by repo with collapsible sections. Provide a top-level summary before the per-repo details.

## Output

Post standup summary as an issue using the `create-issue` safe-output. Use the following format:

```markdown
## [Standup] Daily Standup — {YYYY-MM-DD}

**Repos scanned**: {N} | **Mode**: hybrid

### Summary

| Metric | Count |
|--------|-------|
| Issues closed (24h) | {n} |
| PRs merged (24h) | {n} |
| In-progress issues | {n} |
| PRs awaiting review | {n} |
| Blockers | {n} |
| Upcoming milestones (7d) | {n} |

### Yesterday's Completions

#### Issues Closed
- `{repo}` #{number}: {title} (closed by @{user})

#### PRs Merged
- `{repo}` #{number}: {title} (by @{author})

#### Releases
- `{repo}` {tag}: {name}

### Today's Plan

#### In-Progress Work
- `{repo}` #{number}: {title} (assigned to @{user})

#### Awaiting Review
- `{repo}` #{number}: {title} (reviewers: @{reviewer1}, @{reviewer2})

#### Upcoming Milestones
- `{repo}` {milestone}: due {date} ({n} open / {m} closed)

### Blockers

- `{repo}` #{number}: {title} — {reason}

<details>
<summary>Per-Repo Details ({N} repos with activity)</summary>

#### {repo-name}
- Closed: #{n1} {title}, #{n2} {title}
- Merged: #{n3} {title}
- In-progress: #{n4} {title}

</details>
```

## Fallback

If the safe-output (issue creation) fails (e.g., label missing, quota exceeded), output the complete report as your final response text so it is captured in the workflow run log.

---
*Generated by daily-standup workflow — ${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}*
